steps.title: Identify the central question both texts address
steps.content: Both texts examine why the Norse abandoned Greenland. Text 1 attributes the abandonment to temperature decline during the Little Ice Age; Text 2 proposes drought as the more significant cause. Despite disagreeing on the reason, both texts focus on the same event: the abandonment itself.

steps.title: Match to the answer
steps.content:
B directly identifies the shared focus: the abandonment of the Norse settlement in Greenland.
The others either describe details not mentioned in the texts or confuse a single explanation with the shared topic.
This matches choice B — B is correct.
